mentions.lyric: That's why they call me Young Money LeBron James we ballin'
Call me Kobe Bryant cause I'm ballin' every night
I'm catchin' bodies like Shaq catch alley-oops
Flow butter smooth like Iverson crossover
Got K.D. numbers scoring every night
Never put me on the bench like Pat Ewing I'm too nice
Glove on the court like Payton I'm grabbing every handle
Dunkin' on fools like Vince Carter in the air
Fundamental like Duncan I lay it off the glass
I'm a champion Wade in the fourth I just take over
CP3 vision I see plays before they happen
KG intensity heart of a warrior in the paint
Stepback like Harden they can't guard me in the paint
Shooting like Curry everything I touch is golden
Kyrie handles I'm dribbling through the doubt
Greek freak energy I'm unstoppable in the lane
Ja Morant altitude I'm always rising above
Superman couldn't guard me I'm taller than Howard's ego
Russ triple doubles don't mean nothing when you lose
I score like Melo 30 a night is the minimum
Rose before the fall MVP in the Chi
BD in the building hitting threes from the parking lot
Penny Hardaway with the rock I'm movin through the lane
Steppin like Marbury down the lane
T-Mac numbers in my sleep dropping 30 easy
Cold like Pierce in the fourth when it matters most
Big as Yao Ming standing tall over all opposition
Vision like Kidd I see the whole floor before I move
Passing like Nash two MVPs back to back no stress
Dirk range I'm shooting threes from half court easy
Pure as Ray Allen from three never miss a stroke
Rising like Amare out the paint can't stop the climb
Mr. Big Shot cold like Billups in the clutch
Agent Zero Arenas I pull up from half court and drain it
PG-13 energy going hard every single night
Quiet as Kawhi the claw comes out when it counts
The Process Embiid I trust nobody but myself
Zion power I'm crashing through the lane like a freight train
Dame Time I go off when everybody else freezes
Splash like Klay I let it fly without a dribble
Draymond heart I do the dirty work nobody else wants
Unibrow AD blocking everything in sight
KAT range big man shooting threes like a guard
Ben Simmons won't shoot I'm taking every shot myself
Zo passing I keep the offense flowing never forcing
Ice Trae cold from three in your face with the stepback
Book scoring 70 they said he couldn't but he did
Beal buckets every night never gets the credit he deserves
Kemba crossover deadly from the elbow I just pull up
Bam defense anchor of the whole operation
Oladipo bounce back story they wrote him off too soon
McCollum pull-up off the glass textbook mid-range maestro

Rodman rebounding I grab everything that misses no exceptions

Round Mound of Rebound Barkley I'm taking everything inside

KJ fast as lightning through the lane nobody catches him

Admiral Robinson standing tall in the paint since day one
Mourning I reject everything coming at me in the post
Sprewell temper I'll choke out anybody who gets in my way
GP on the court I talk trash and back it up every time
Richmond scoring in Sacramento nobody was watching but I was there
Small as Muggsy but I move the ball better than anyone
Kemp throw it down I'm dunking on everybody in the building
Van Exel pull-up I hit the long two with no hesitation
Rice pure shooter I let it fly from anywhere on the floor
King James legacy building something that outlasts the game itself
Durant patience I wait for my spot then I explode
Kobe mentality mamba mode I never stop attacking

Duncan consistency night in night out you know what you getting
AI crossover I leave defenders on the floor reaching for air
Shaq dominant I back you down until there's nowhere left to go

Giannis nonstop I don't need a jumper I just go through you
I ball like LeBron pass it off to my team
KD silent in the room but loud on the court
Kobe cold in the fourth like a killer never stops
Curry quick release I shoot before the defense reacts
LeBron taking it coast to coast nobody stops the king

Dame cold from deep like Lillard in your face at the buzzer
Giannis coming down the lane like a freight train unstoppable
The Process still running I trust the work like Embiid
Ice cold like Trae from deep nobody checks his handle

Kawhi composure never rattled let the claw do the talking
Butler intensity I bring that Miami heat every possession
Tatum takeover Boston needed a closer and he answered
Book scoring in Phoenix they finally got their superstar
Ja dunking on everybody in Memphis it's his city now
AI handle quicker than a hiccup leaving defenders on the floor
Shaq power I'm dominant I back you down no escape
KG hunger from the jump he came to win every night
Dirk one leg fadeaway I pull up from wherever I want

Wade in Miami I bring the heat every night championship mode
Griffin throwing it down I dunk with authority and purpose
Kyrie handles like a point god dribbles through any defense
Beal getting buckets in DC thirty a night no noise
KAT range and touch you can't guard him at the five
Spida climbing every rung nobody can stop the rise in Utah
Bam energy every play he brings the anchor to that team

Siakam versatile they counted him out but he came back better
Payton glove on defence he guards everybody zero to sixty
Miller from three I hit the big shot and talk about it

Barkley crash the boards I own the paint on both ends
Ewing in the post I'm dominant old school paint presence

Westbrook explosive first step nobody guards him in transition
Durant silent but violent scores forty and doesn't say a word
LeBron element fire and ice fourth quarter he takes over

Draymond talking loud but can you back it up where it counts
